title.zh: 我们现在应该开发这个 AI 功能 MVP 吗？
title.en: Should we build the AI feature MVP now?

question.zh: 团队是否应该现在投入两名工程师，用 30 天完成这个功能的 MVP？
question.en: Should the team spend two engineers for 30 days building the MVP now?

hypothesis.zh: 目标用户在接触该功能后的 14 天内，会表现出足够强的付费意愿。
hypothesis.en: Target users will show enough willingness to pay for the feature within 14 days of exposure.

success_metric.zh: 至少 5% 的目标用户愿意预订或明确承诺付费。
success_metric.en: At least 5% of target users pre-order or commit to pay.

source_summary.zh: 对目标用户的结构化访谈

label.zh: 在 concierge 测试中愿意预订的用户
label.en: Users willing to pre-order in a concierge test

summary.zh: 12 位目标用户中有 5 位对该能力表达了强需求。
summary.en: 5 of 12 target users expressed strong demand for the capability.

notes.zh: 口头表达的需求可能会高估真实付费意愿。
notes.en: Stated demand may overstate real willingness to pay.

summary.zh: 一个接近的竞品最近上线了类似功能。
summary.en: A close competitor recently launched a similar feature.

notes.zh: 这是间接证据，同时也可能意味着竞争会更激烈。
notes.en: This is indirect evidence and may also imply stronger competition.

name.zh: 历史相关实验转化偏弱

summary.zh: 过去相关实验的转化率大约只有 3%。
summary.en: Past related experiments converted at roughly 3%.

notes.zh: 参考类相似，但并不完全一致。
notes.en: The reference class is similar but not identical.

name.zh: 现在直接开发完整 MVP
先做 7 天 landing page 测试

candidates.zh: 先跑一个 7 天的 landing page 测试，至少拿到 100 个目标用户访问样本。
candidates.en: Run a 7-day landing-page test with at least 100 target-user visits.

candidates.zh: 优先收集预订或押金信号，而不是只看口头兴趣。
candidates.en: Collect pre-order or deposit signals instead of stated interest.

candidates.zh: 基于更可比的产品类型和买方细分重新校准参考类。
candidates.en: Re-check the reference class using comparable products and buyer segments.
